feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Payment Medium Format - Data Source in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

in the attached file you can see a payment medium of a US customer. Their bank requires certain information in the ID section of the payment medium. It is possible to set one ID for both fields, using the 'customer number' in house bank settings. But to only have one ID for both fields and not two different IDs for each of them is not sufficient to the bank's requirements.

How is it possible to set two seperate IDs. Which field in the system controls the field in the payment medium? What can I do in Public Cloud?

Thank you for your help!

BR

Jan-Niklas

entry.title: Add header text to uploading budget template PSM
entry.content:
I’m reaching out for assistance with an issue we’re facing in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment (Public Sector scope).

We’re currently uploading budgets for specific cost centers using the “Public Sector: Run Application Job” functionality. The job runs successfully and the budget documents appear in the “Manage Budget Documents” app. However, when we go to the Manage Budget Documents app, we see that the document description in the header is always set to “Generated Automatically” (see attached screenshot). We would like to add our own description during the upload (For example: Budget round June 2025), so that the documents are easier to recognize afterwards. 

 

So far, I’ve tried the following:

 

  1. Adding a custom column in the upload template → either ignored or causes an error
  1. Renaming the job title → only shows in the job log, not as the document header text
  1. Creating budget documents manually via the app → works, but not feasible for bulk uploads
  1. Looking into APIs or extensibility options → seems overly complex or unavailable in standard public cloud

 

My questions:

 

  1. Is there a standard way to include a document header text when uploading budgets via the application job?
  1. If so, how can this be configured or enabled?
  1. If not, what would be the best alternative to ensure uploaded documents are easily distinguishable?

 

Looking forward to your guidance.

entry.title: Request for setting default field value in purchase orders
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are working in the S4/HANA Public Cloud environment and would like to configure default values for specific fields when creating a purchase order (PO). We are specifically looking to prefill fields such as:

- Company code 

- Purchasing group 

We have already reviewed the options under Set User Defaults, but these fields are either unavailable there or not taking effect during PO creation. For instance, i filled in "001" as default value for Purchasing group without any result.

Could you please advise us:

1. Whether it's possible to achieve this through configuration or user personalization in Public Cloud?

2. If not, what is the recommended way to set such default fields?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Bank Statement MT940
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I would like to know if the MT940 format supports client accounts.

I checked the Make Global Settings for Electronic Bank; the system fixed to GL account "++++++++30"

I need to design GL account bank as follow:

Sample GL Account code

1000001  Bank Balance

1000002 Bank incoming (Use the account code for post incoming payment)

1000003 Bank outgoing (Use the account code for post outgoing payment)

Sample Transaction(Incoming Payment)

Dr. 1000002 Bank incoming 

       Cr. AR

Sample Import Bank Statement (Manage Incoming Payment Files):

Dr. 1000001  Bank Balance

    Cr. ++++++++90 (Technical Account)

Dr. ++++++++30 (Other Bank Transfer)

    Cr. ++++++++90 (Technical Account)

The account code 1000002 Bank incoming not clear to zero.

Please advise and confirm GL Account code for setting in make global. 

Thanks,

Chanaporn S.

entry.title: 公有云系统中，量差与价差的核算未能分别体现，全部核算到价差中，没有体现量差，如何处置？
entry.content: 公有云系统中，量差与价差的核算未能分别体现，全部核算到价差中，没有体现量差，如何处置？

entry.title: How to Resolve Issues Transporting Flavors - S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
I am working with S/4HANA public cloud edition 2502, and attempting to use the "post goods receipt" application to create a flavor for our end users.

After doing the work to the flavor in the development system, I have created the assignment category for the flavor and completed the export collection/import collection process to move changes from the development system to the test system.

However, when launching the flavor in the test system, there are several fields missing from the adapted screen.

How can this be solved in the public cloud? I only have access to the "manage flavors" application, but I don't see any options in that application for troubleshooting.

entry.title: Sending order confirmation with attachments via email in sales order in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We currently have the requirement that in the S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition, when an order confirmation for a sales order is sent by e-mail, attachments such as the general terms and conditions and the cancellation policy should also be sent together with the order confirmation. Is there an option for this in the S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition? If not, do you have any workarounds that we could use for this?

Best Regards,

Omid

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Creation of problem-solving process failed (error code: 401 Unauthorized)
entry.content: From the Change Notification application (QM02) we clicked on "Start problem solving" from the action box and saving we get the attached error

entry.title: Service Order WITH BATCH
entry.content:
Good morning,

Could you please help me with the following error message?

1.A Service Order was created with a material that is managed in batches.

2.The system is asking us to enter a BATCH, but we've searched the entire document and can't find a way to add it.

3.The position also does not allow us to enter the Batch.

 

I've searched for documentation but can't find any. Can you help me? Or should I report it to SAP support?

Thank you 

Gustavo Angel Tamayo Ponce.

entry.title: Request for Business Role to License Type Mapping Document
entry.content:
Hi,

Please explain how to check the app names along with their associated license types, such as Advanced, Core, or Self-Service. 

Regards,

Silambarasan


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 国内跨公司销售POD不生效
entry.content:
同一个公司下的销售组织和工厂，POD使用正常； 国内的跨公司销售（工厂和销售组织属于不同公司），POD不能使用；销售订单带出的移动类型为601，带不出687 。如下图：

 

IMG中“设置现货销售与 VSiT 流程的相关性”不允许配置工厂和销售组织属于不同公司的配置；如下图

entry.title: Z migration object names generated for Z projects in Migration Modeler
entry.content:
Hi,

In app Migrate Your Data and tcode LTMOM, we can find the object technical names begins with 'Z'. Can you confirm if this is a normal acceptable behavior?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to exclude hedged open items from foreign currency valuation using exchange rate fields?
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

My question is:
Is there a way to configure foreign currency valuation to exclude open items with a manually fixed exchange rate, such as those covered by FX contracts?

Background:
In Japan, FX contracts are typically managed through allocation rather than SAP’s hedge management functionality. For open items (e.g., sales orders or invoices) that are already covered by FX contracts, we would like to exclude them from foreign currency valuation during month-end closing.

We noticed the field "Accounting Exchange Rate" is available in the document and are wondering if it can be used as a condition to exclude such items from valuation.

Attached screenshots for reference:

Sales Order screen – showing the manually maintained exchange rate

Journal Entry (Accounting Document) – showing the accounting exchange rate carried over

Foreign Currency Valuation result – showing that the item is still being evaluated

Any advice, experience, or workaround (even using enhancements or BAdIs) would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance.

FYI: We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (2408).

entry.title: Warehouse tasks automation in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
How to create warehouse put away and picking (Inbound and Outbound) tasks automatically in S4 PERSON_NAME Public cloud edition,


kindly provide the configuration details or scope ids.

entry.title: Cannot Generate Handling Unit Using 311 to move storage IM to WM Managed
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Regarding our need to move stock from Sloc IM Managed to WM Managed using 311, we need to automatically generate the Handling Unit. But now, we cannot pack it automatically even if we maintain the packing instructions & determination. Is there any additional configuration needed to maintain automatic packing using movement type 311?

Regards,

Melani

entry.title: SAP MRM: What is the retention period of the job logs in Schedule Treasury Back Office Jobs app?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using Schedule Treasury Back Office Jobs for executing Request Current Market Data job on daily basis.

We would like to know that what would be the retention period of job logs and spools of this job? 

Thanks & regards,

Rushi

entry.title: Do we have an option in Public cloud to schedule a report and send to specific mail id
entry.content: Business is planning to use the option for all possible reports like GL line-item report, Supplier line items, customer line items, etc. Do we have an option in Public cloud to schedule a report and send to specific mail id

entry.title: Custom CBC Customizations
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m building an integration between SAP Public Cloud and an external system. The external system sends messages via SAP Integration Suite, and some documents need to be created using API calls. In order to do that, I need a mapping that can be customized somewhere in the system.

For example, the external system contains Company Codes that are not part of SAP, and based on those, we need to determine which Company Code in SAP should be used. The client would like this customization to be handled inside SAP and to retrieve the values via web interface when needed.

In this example, we would need a table with two columns, where the first column is the external system’s ID (used as a key), and the second column is the SAP Company Code, for example:

 

External    

SAP

Comp1      

1000

Comp2      

2000

Comp4      

3000

 

The customer wants to manage this data in CBC on CUST/PROD and transport it to TEST and then to PROD using transport requests.

I’ve tried several ways to achieve this:

  1. I created a Custom Business Object and I’m able to access it via web service. It can be maintained on CUST/PROD, but the data cannot be included in a Customizing Transport.
  2. I created Tables using Eclipse and published them locally via Service Bindings. The tables and related objects are in a local package, so I cannot transport this development to the test system. In my opinion this is okay since the objects are local, but I was able to launch the Fiori app "Custom Business Configuration", which saves the data to a Customizing Transport Request. I can release the local request.
  3. Same as point 2, except the objects are in a package assigned to Software Component ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT. The objects were added to a Transport Request that has an ATO route. In this case, the same thing works, but the objects still cannot be transported to the test system because the request cannot be released.

 

Other questions:

  • We use Cloud ALM with scoping. 
  • I have access rights for process authoring but I can not create CBC in it.
  • Is CALM relevant for my problem?
  • I used this Create a SAP Fiori based Table Maintenance app with SAP BTP, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials  as template but it is not generally for Public Cloud
  • Annotation @ObjectModel.configuration  is missing. Is that relevant?
  • In CBC when I change scope I do not see "Custom" tile. 
  • Scope is in status Completed and when I wont to edit it I got a strange message "If you edit the scope, one or multiple already confirmed activities and the phase may change. After editing, you need to reconfirm the respective activities.". It is not clear what will happened if I add something.

Now I have only this :

 

And I can use it only on DEV/CUST

What I really want:

 

 

If there are a better solution please inform me.

Thank you

entry.title: 有没有一个报表或者CDS，可以查看所有物料的标注价格、实际价格、库存数量、收发货数量
